dimensions.label: Target Preparation
dimensions.description: Prepare one Claude Code target plus one paired local shell target cleanly, including any trust/interstitial prompt handling.

dimensions.label: Shell Lane Execution
dimensions.description: Bootstrap the project, run tests, make the shell-only follow-up change, and show current diff evidence from the paired shell lane.

dimensions.label: First Interactive Turn
dimensions.description: Use the existing Claude Code pane for a real first review/suggestion turn without duplicating or bypassing the interactive target.

dimensions.label: Resumed Interactive Turn
dimensions.description: Return to the same Claude Code pane after intervening shell work and complete a second review/message turn there.

dimensions.label: Continuity and Reuse
dimensions.description: Preserve the same paired workspace and make the shell lane versus both Claude Code turns auditable in the final summary.
